rows.name: Exchanges_Info
rows.content: The following represents a regular Parenting Time Schedule that starts over and repeats every two (2) weeks. One week is defined as a period of seven (7) consecutive days, beginning on Monday and ending on Sunday.

rows.name: Exchanges
rows.label: Enter the periods you will have the {{$if(length(ChildInfo) == 1, 'child', 'children')}}:

templates.label: Week on, Week off
templates.description: Parties get alternating 7-day parenting time periods.
Petitioner always has kid(s) on Mondays and Tuesdays, as well as alternating weekends.

rows.name: Breaks_Heading
rows.content:
Breaks

Breaks are when school is not in session. Breaks do not start/stop on a specific day of the year but are dependant on the individual child's school schedule.

Breaks supersede the regular Parenting Time Schedule.

rows.name: SPB_YesNo
rows.label: Will there be a separate schedule for Spring Break?

rows.name: SPB_Division
rows.label: How will this break be divided?

options.label: The entire break will be alternated.
One party will have the break.

rows.name: SPB_Alternate
rows.label: How will the break be alternated?
options: {{PetFirst}} will have Spring Break on all even years and {{RespFirst}} will have Spring Break on odd years.
{{RespFirst}} will have Spring Break on all even years and {{PetFirst}} will have Spring Break on odd years.

rows.name: SPB_Divided
rows.label: How will the break be divided?
options: {{PetFirst}} will have the first half of the break every year and {{RespFirst}} will have the second half every year.
{{RespFirst}} will have the first half of the break every year and {{PetFirst}} will have the second half every year.
{{PetFirst}} will have the first half of the break on all even years and the second half on odd years.
{{RespFirst}} will have the first half of the break on all even years and the second half on odd years.

rows.name: SPB_Time
rows.label: Exchange Time
rows.tooltip: This exchange will take place on the middlemost day of the break.

rows.name: SPB_Always
rows.label: Which party will have the break?

rows.name: SPB_Divided_Explainer
rows.content: If the break has an even number of days, the exchange will take place on the day following the mid-point.

rows.name: VacationWeeks
rows.label: How many weeks of vacation will each party be entitled to each year?
rows.tooltip: A week is defined as seven (7) consecutive days. Either party may elect to take their vacation time upon giving the other party no less than thirty (30) days written notice of their intent to take vacation time.

rows.name: Holidays_Header
rows.content:
Holidays

Holidays are single or partial day exceptions to the regular Parenting Time Schedule which occur annually.

Holidays supersede the regular Parenting Time Schedule.

rows.name: Holidays
rows.label: Please enter the following information about any needed holidays

rows.name: Holidays.{{$index}}.Name
rows.label: Name of holiday
rows.tooltip: Enter a name of a custom holiday, or select from the predefined list.

rows.label: The regular schedule will resume on the
